route_summary: Your 120-minute mixed tour (guided style) visits 29 key galleries across 52 rooms. We focused on metalwork and ceramics and furnishings from Chinese, Korean, Japanese. You're looking for something elegant, colorful, intricate — we kept that in mind.

route.name: Chinese Ceramics & More!
route.reason: You'll pass through here on your way — keep an eye out.

featured_artworks.title: Vase
featured_artworks.medium: Porcelain with peach-bloom glaze (Jingdezhen ware)
featured_artworks.alt_text: Slender porcelain vase with a white rim, three neck rings, and mottled reddish-pink glaze
featured_artworks.reason: Picked because you said you love ceramics and you're drawn to Chinese art and it's a museum highlight.

route.name: Gallery 202
route.reason: This gallery is rich in ceramics — right up your alley.
